title: <div>   * Run the exact same test suite from [P2-A] on the newly amalgamated mai
content:
* Run the exact same test suite from [P2-A] on the newly amalgamated main branch.
* Definition of Completion: This phase is complete only if the test results are equal to or better than the baseline. If new tests fail, this is the primary focus for Phase 5.
Phase 4: Analysis & Task Definition [P4]
* Repository Knowledge Graph [P4-A]:
* Scan the amalgamated main branch.
* Generate the interconnected knowledge graph mapping files, functions, dependencies, and user context.
* Automated Documentation [P4-B]:
* Generate README.md files for all logically significant directories (e.g., /src, /scripts), not for trivial ones (e.g., /assets/img).
* Domain Research & Audit [P4-C]:
* Generate the RESEARCH.md annotated bibliography.
* Audit the codebase for best practices, security, and linting.
* Triage the ingested existing issues [P1-A] against the new audit.
* Swarm Task Scaffolding [P4-D]:
* Generate a new Project board.
* Populate it with all identified tasks, including:
* Resolving test failures from [P3-B].
